item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'
import os,glob,csv
for f in sorted(glob.glob('Desktop/ASSETS/2024/Depreciation/Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_*.csv')):
    with open(f,'r',encoding='utf-8-sig',newline='') as fh:
        rows=list(csv.reader(fh))
    print('FILE',f,'ROWS',len(rows))
    for r in rows[:5]:
        print(r)
    print()
PY"

/bin/bash -lc "python - <<'PY'

for f in sorted(glob.glob('Desktop/ASSETS/2024/Depreciation/Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_*.csv')):

item.command:
/bin/bash -lc "mkdir -p model_output && python - <<'PY'
import csv, glob, os
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

files = sorted(glob.glob('Desktop/ASSETS/2024/Depreciation/Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_*.csv'))
rows = []
for f in files:
    with open(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8-sig', newline='') as fh:
        reader = csv.DictReader(fh)
        rows.extend(list(reader))

def money_to_num(s):
    return float(str(s).replace('¥','').replace(',','').strip()) if s else 0.0

def pct_to_num(s):
    return float(str(s).replace('%','').strip())/100 if s else 0.0

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = 'PH_12'

title = 'Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (PH_12)'
ws.merge_cells('A1:J1')
ws['A1'] = title
ws['A1'].font = Font(size=14, bold=True)
ws['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 24

ws.merge_cells('A2:J2')
ws['A2'] = 'Based on 2024 asset depreciation details'
ws['A2'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center')

headers = ['No.','Asset ID','Asset Name','Purchase Date','Original Value','Depreciation This Month','Accumulated Depreciation','Net Value','Residual Value Rate','Remarks']
start_row = 4
for col, h in enumerate(headers, 1):
    c = ws.cell(start_row, col, h)
    c.font = Font(bold=True, color='FFFFFF')
    c.fill = PatternFill('solid', fgColor='4F81BD')
    c.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')

thin = Side(style='thin', color='000000')
for idx, r in enumerate(rows, 1):
    rr = start_row + idx
    vals = [
        idx,
        r['Asset ID'],
        r['Asset Name'],
        r['Purchase Date'],
        money_to_num(r['Original Value']),
        money_to_num(r['Depreciation This Month']),
        money_to_num(r['Accumulated Depreciation']),
        money_to_num(r['Net Value']),
        pct_to_num(r['Residual Value Rate']),
        ''
    ]
    for col, v in enumerate(vals, 1):
        c = ws.cell(rr, col, v)
        if col in [1,2,3,4,10]:
            c.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
        else:
            c.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')

sum_row = start_row + len(rows) + 1
ws.cell(sum_row, 1, 'Total')
ws.merge_cells(start_row=sum_row, start_column=1, end_row=sum_row, end_column=4)
for col in [5,6,7,8]:
    letter = get_column_letter(col)
    ws.cell(sum_row, col, f'=SUM({letter}{start_row+1}:{letter}{sum_row-1})')
ws.cell(sum_row, 9, f'=AVERAGE(I{start_row+1}:I{sum_row-1})')
ws.cell(sum_row, 10, '')

for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=start_row, max_row=sum_row, min_col=1, max_col=10):
    for c in row:
        c.border = Border(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin)

for r in range(start_row+1, sum_row+1):
    for col in [5,6,7,8]:
        ws.cell(r, col).number_format = '¥#,##0.00'
    ws.cell(r, 9).number_format = '0%'

widths = {1:8,2:15,3:22,4:14,5:16,6:22,7:24,8:14,9:18,10:14}
for col, width in widths.items():
    ws.column_dimensions[get_column_letter(col)].width = width

out = 'model_output/fixed_asset_depreciation_ledger_PH_12.xlsx'
wb.save(out)
print(out)

import csv, glob, os
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment, Border, Side
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter

files = sorted(glob.glob('Desktop/ASSETS/2024/Depreciation/Depreciation_Breakdown_2024_*.csv'))
rows = []
for f in files:
    with open(f, 'r', encoding='utf-8-sig', newline='') as fh:
        reader = csv.DictReader(fh)
        rows.extend(list(reader))

def money_to_num(s):
    return float(str(s).replace('¥','').replace(',','').strip()) if s else 0.0

def pct_to_num(s):
    return float(str(s).replace('%','').strip())/100 if s else 0.0

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = 'PH_12'

title = 'Fixed Asset Depreciation Ledger (PH_12)'
ws.merge_cells('A1:J1')
ws['A1'] = title
ws['A1'].font = Font(size=14, bold=True)
ws['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
ws.row_dimensions[1].height = 24

ws.merge_cells('A2:J2')

    ]
    for col, v in enumerate(vals, 1):

            c.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center', vertical='center')
        else:
            c.alignment = Alignment(horizontal='right', vertical='center')

sum_row = start_row + len(rows) + 1
ws.cell(sum_row, 1, 'Total')
ws.merge_cells(start_row=sum_row, start_column=1, end_row=sum_row, end_column=4)
for col in [5,6,7,8]:
    letter = get_column_letter(col)
    ws.cell(sum_row, col, f'=SUM({letter}{start_row+1}:{letter}{sum_row-1})')
ws.cell(sum_row, 9, f'=AVERAGE(I{start_row+1}:I{sum_row-1})')
ws.cell(sum_row, 10, '')

for row in ws.iter_rows(min_row=start_row, max_row=sum_row, min_col=1, max_col=10):

        c.border = Border(left=thin, right=thin, top=thin, bottom=thin)

for r in range(start_row+1, sum_row+1):

        ws.cell(r, col).number_format = '¥#,##0.00'
    ws.cell(r, 9).number_format = '0%'
